recommendations.title: Trivisa
recommendations.overview: Hong Kong's three notorious thieves who have never met one another before appear in the same restaurant. This leads to a rumour that they are joining forces to pull off something big before the Handover, though this is not something that any of them.
recommendations.director: Vicky Wong Wai-Kit, Frank Hui, Jevons Au Man-Kit

recommendations.title: The Shadow's Edge
recommendations.overview: Macau Police brings the tracking expert police officer out of retirement to help catch a dangerous group of professional thieves.

recommendations.title: Badges of Fury
recommendations.overview: When a series of eerie murders erupts across Hong Kong, grizzled veteran Huang and his reckless younger partner Wang, are assigned to track down the killer.

recommendations.title: Cold War II
recommendations.overview: A suspected criminal mastermind escapes from police custody, throwing the city into turmoil. With the police department now divided, rival police chiefs are forced to take their fight to the streets of Hong Kong with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Transit
recommendations.overview: Nate takes his family for a camping trip to reconnect. When they pull off at a rest stop, a gang of thieves hides their stash from an armored car robbery among the family belongings. They soon find themselves on the run and the gang will stop at noth

recommendations.title: Kansas City Confidential
recommendations.overview: An ex-convict sets out to uncover who framed him for an armored car robbery.

recommendations.title: Police Story 2
recommendations.overview: The Hong Kong super-cop must stop a group of blackmailing bombers at the same time that the villains of the first Police Story are out for revenge.

recommendations.title: Gorgeous
recommendations.overview: When Ah Bu, a girl from a small fishing town in Taiwan, finds a glass bottle with a romantic message, she travels to Hong Kong to find her prince charming. As it turns out, her prince charming, Albert, happens to be gay. But all is not lost when Ah B

recommendations.title: The King of the Kickboxers
recommendations.overview: Jake, a New York policeman  poses as an actor to expose the making of martial-arts death movies in Thailand.

recommendations.title: Dragon Tiger Gate
recommendations.overview: Three young martial arts masters emerge from the back streets of Hong Kong to help the powerless fight injustice.
